Stable SDL3-CS release for SDL 3.4.12.

This release publishes the managed `SDL3-CS` wrapper and platform-specific native NuGet packages for Windows, Linux, macOS, Android, iOS, and tvOS. Native packages use `SDL3-CS.<Platform>` and `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.<Addon>` package IDs.

## Package Versions

| Package family | Version |
|----------------|---------|
| `SDL3-CS` | `3.4.12.0` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>` | `3.4.12.0` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.Image` | `3.4.4.0` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.Mixer` | `3.2.4.0` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.TTF` | `3.2.2.0` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.Shadercross` | `3.0.0.0` |

## Changes From SDL 3.4.10

- Updated core SDL native target from `3.4.10` to `3.4.12`.
- Added `SDL.Hints.EnableSteamScreenKeyboard` for upstream `SDL_HINT_ENABLE_STEAM_SCREEN_KEYBOARD`.
- Updated `SDL.AudioStreamCallback` XML documentation with the upstream warning not to call `SDL.DestroyAudioStream` on the callback stream while the callback is running.
- Kept the MinGW-only `SDL_TriggerBreakpoint` macro implementation change out of the managed wrapper, because SDL3-CS does not expose this C macro as public managed API.
